is - internal tools CLI

Usage:
  is <command> [options]

Commands:
  version Show installed CLI/package version.
  tree   Print a simplified repo tree (csproj, sln, cs).
  down   Run docker compose down for a module (e.g., is down infra).
  up     Run docker compose up for a module (e.g., is up infra).
  help   Show help information for available commands.
